phone.label: Lambarka telefoonka
phone.searchCountry: Raadi dalka, koodhka, ama horudhaca taleefanka
phone.noCountries: Ma jiraan dal la mid ah raadintaada.
phone.tooShort: Lambarkan telefoonka aad buu u gaaban yahay.
phone.tooLong: Lambarkan telefoonka waa mid aad u dheer.
phone.invalid: Geli lambarka telefoonka ee saxda ah ee dalka la doortay.
phone.valid: Lambarka taleefanka caalamiga ah ee saxda ah

auth.onboardingTagline: Saaxiib badbaado shakhsi ah xilliyada u dhexeeya "Waan fiicanahay" iyo "Waxaan u baahanahay caawimaad."
auth.createSubtitle: Dooro habka gelitaanka si aad u ilaaliso jaantuskaaga badbaadada.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Ma dhammaystiri karin isdiiwaangelinta. Hubi xiriirkaaga oo mar kale isku day.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Iyadoo la adeegsanayo kal-fadhiga horumarinta maxalliga ah. Native Google Sign-In waxay ka shaqeysaa dhisme horumarineed.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Isku xidh hadda ama sii wad oo ku dar markale.
auth.northStarBody: Qalabka VL01 ee la xidho wuxuu kici karaa socodka badbaadada iyadoo la adeegsanayo taabasho iyo dhaqdhaqaaqyo riixid dheer.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Saaxiibkaaga badbaadada ee khariidada iyo wicitaanada.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear ka caawin kartaa habka guriga, habka ilaaliyaha, habka degdegga ah, wicitaannada cudurdaarsiyo, iyo taageerada codka.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Waxaa loo isticmaalay khariidada, meelaha khatarta, imaanshaha badbaadada ah, iyo macnaha SOS.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving weydiiyaa goobta si ilaaliyadu u fahmaan meesha caawimaad loo baahan karo. Waxaad beddeli kartaa tan dambe Settings-ka.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Ogeysiisyadu waxay taageeraan hubinta iyo dhacdooyinka degdegga ah.
permissions.notificationsBody: Waxaan isticmaalnaa oo kaliya ogeysiisyada amniga, cusbooneysiinta degdegga ah, iyo xusuusinta aad awoodiso.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Goobtu waxay ilaalisaa macnaha badbaadada si sax ah
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving wuxuu isticmaalaa goobtaada si uu u helo khariidada badbaadada, aagagga khatarta, wadaagga degdega ah, iyo macnaha SOS. Waxaad beddeli kartaa tan dambe Settings-ka.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Digniinaha badbaadada waxay u baahan yihiin ogeysiisyo
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving waxay dirtaa xusuusin hubin, cusbooneysiin degdeg ah, iyo tilmaamo badbaado oo aad awoodiso. Ma isticmaalno ogeysiisyada xayaysiisyada.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Makarafoonku wuxuu awood siiya wicitaannada badbaadada
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving isticmaalaa makarafoonkaaga kaliya markaad bilowdo wicitaan AI saaxiib ama badbaado.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving wuxuu isticmaalaa Bluetooth si uu ula xiriiro dahabka NorthStar, uu akhriyo xaaladda xiriirka, iyo inuu kiciyo socodka badbaadada ee qalabka la xiro.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving isticmaalaa kamaradda oo kaliya markaad doorato inaad sawir profile ka qaaddo ama la wadaagto sawir badbaado ah.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving ka dhigtaa socodkan mid laga heli karo Settings iyo dashboard-ka.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Dooro codka saaxiibka ah ee ugu ammaan badan in la maqlo.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Kormeer aamusnaan ah oo badbaado maalinle ah.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: La wadaag macnaha dadka lagu kalsoon yahay.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Shan taabasho ayaa kor u kici kara digniinaha SOS iyo ilaaliyaha.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Abuur sabab qurux badan oo aad uga baxdo xaalad aan raaxo lahayn.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Bilow wicitaan saaxiib waqtiga-dhabta ah markaad u baahan tahay taageero.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Isku day socodka badbaadada ee demo cadaadis hoose leh.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Dahabka ag dhow ku hay inta aad baarayso.
jewelry.noDevices: Qalab NorthStar oo dhow lama helin weli.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth baadhistu ma bilaaban karin. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
jewelry.scanFailed: Ma aanan helin dahabka agagaarka. Hubi Bluetooth, NorthStar dhow, mar kale isku day.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth baadhistu ma bilaaban karin. Hubi Bluetooth gelitaanka oo mar kale isku day.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Gelitaanka qalabka agagaarka waa la damiyay. U ogolaa Bluetooth gelitaanka Settings, ka dibna isku day mar kale.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar aad u dheerayd inaan isku xiro. U dhaqaaji meel u dhow oo mar kale isku day.
jewelry.connectFailed: Ma aanan la xiriiri karin NorthStar. Hubi in uu ku dallaco oo ag dhow yahay, markaas mar kale isku day.
jewelry.emptyMessage: NorthStar ku hay dallac oo ku dhow telefoonkan, ka dibna mar kale baar.

home.subtitle: Dashboard-ka saaxiibka badbaadada
home.readyBody: Codka, khariidada, dahabka, iyo ilaaliyayaal hal taabasho ayaa u jirta.

map.title: Khariidadda badbaadada
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go hordhac; Mapbox lagu soo bandhigo dhisme horumarineed.
map.updateFailed: Ma cusboonaysiin karno goobtaada. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
map.notRequested: Helitaanka goobta lama codsan. Waxaad ka hawlgelin kartaa goor dambe Settings.
map.permissionOff: Helitaanka goobta waa la damiyay. Hawlgeli Settings si khariidada badbaadada kuu dhexdhexaadiso.
map.timeout: Goobtaada ayaa qaadanaysa waqti ka badan sidii la filayay. U dhaqaaq meel calaamad cad oo mar kale isku day.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Meelo la badbaadiyay weli ma jiraan
map.savedEmptyMessage: Meelaha lagu kalsoon yahay ee aad kaydsato ayaa halkan ka soo muuqan doonta si degdeg ah loo helo.

safetyCall.ready: Diyaar u ah in la isku xiro
safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Si ammaan ah ugu xirma saaxiibkaaga codka...
safetyCall.typePlaceholder: Nooca haddii hadalka uu adag yahay
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Bilow wicitaanka ama fariin qor markaad diyaar tahay.

chat.retryAccessibility: Isku day mar kale fariin dirista

history.clearMessage: Tani waxay ka saartaa fariimaha la keydiyay AI saaxiib ee qalabkan.
history.title: Taariikhda Wadahadalka
history.subtitle: AI farriimo la socda oo lagu kaydiyay qalabkan.
history.emptyMessage: Wadahadalladaada AI ee saaxiibada ayaa halkan ka soo muuqan doona kadib wicitaankaaga ugu horreeya.
history.loadFailed: Ma aanan soo gelin karin taariikhda wada hadalka. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
history.clearFailed: Taariikhda wada hadalka ma nadiifin karno. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
history.deleteFailed: Ma tirtiri karno wadahadalkaas. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

voices.title: Codadka wicitaanka badbaadada
voices.subtitle: Dooro codka saaxiibka ah ee saxda ah in la maqlo.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Fadlan mar kale isku day inaad codka doorato.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Muunaddan codka lama ciyaari karin. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Isticmaal jawaabaha la socda marka aqoonsiga shabakadda ama Hume aan la heli karin.
settings.privacyBody: Dhoofi ama tirtir xogta maxalliga ah ee lagu kaydiyay qalabkan.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Ma awoodo in xogtaada la dhoofiyo hadda.
settings.deleteConfirmTitle: Dhammaan xogta maxalliga ah ma tirtiri karaa?
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Tani waxay ka saartaa profile-kaaga, dejimahaaga, xiriirada degdegga ah, taariikhda wada hadalka, xusuusinta ogolaanshaha, iyo kalfadhiga aqoonsiga maxalliga ah ee qalabkan.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Ma awoodo in la tirtiro xogta maxalliga ah hadda.

sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, ilaaliyeyaasha, iyo xiriirada degdegga ah

settings.updateFailedMessage: Ma badbaadin karno doorashadaas. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Fadhigaagu weli waa mid firfircoon. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

contacts.title: Xiriirada degdegga ah
contacts.subtitle: Dad lagu kalsoon yahay oo diyaar u ah inta lagu jiro socodka badbaadada.
contacts.name: Magaca
contacts.empty: Xiriirro degdeg ah lama kordhin weli.
contacts.emptyTitle: Weli xiriir degdeg ah lama hayo
contacts.emptyMessage: Ku dar qof aad ku kalsoon tahay si uu diyaar u noqdo marka badbaado u baahan yahay.
contacts.removeMessage: Qofkan mar dambe kuma soo muuqan doono socodkaaga degdegga ah.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Xiriirkan ma badbaadin karno. Faahfaahinta hubi oo mar kale isku day.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Xiriirkan ma ka saari karno. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

friends.title: Saaxiibo
friends.subtitle: Ilaaliyayaal, codsiyada, iyo jaantuska degdegga ah.
friends.emptyMessage: Asxaabta lagu kalsoon yahay iyo ilaaliyayaal ayaa halkan ka soo muuqan doona marka la daray.

emergency.title: Degdeg SOS
emergency.subtitle: Kordhi kaliya marka aad u baahan tahay taageero degdeg ah.
emergency.body: Tani waxay ogeysiin doontaa socodkaaga badbaadada waxayna diyaarin doontaa xiriirada degdegga ah.
emergency.addContact: Ku dar xiriir degdeg ah Settings-ka.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Qaybta wadaagga goobta waa diyaar. Ku xir dhamaadka share-ka backend-ka si aad u dirto xiriirro toos ah.

capybearTap.title: Capybear
capybearTap.subtitle: Laba jeer taabo NorthStar si aad u tuurto liin badbaado ah.
capybearTap.body: Jidka Gesture-ka waa diyaar si loogu sameeyo fiilooyinka dhacdooyinka BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Waxaad u muuqataa mid offline ah. Fariintaada waa la diri doonaa markaad dib isugu xirto.
errors.voiceQueued: Fariinta waa la badbaadiyay. Waxaa la diri doonaa marka codka saaxiibka uu dib isugu xiro.
errors.voiceRetrying: Mar kale isku dayaya inaad fariintaada dirto...
errors.voiceConnecting: Si ammaan ah ugu xirma saaxiibkaaga codka...
errors.microphone: Helitaanka makarafoonka ayaa loo baahan yahay wicitaannada codka. Waxaad furi kartaa Settings, ama fariin qor halkii.
errors.billing: Barnaamijka codka ee internetka si ku-meel-gaar ah looma heli karo. Waxaad sii wadi kartaa saaxiibka offline-ka.
errors.authentication: Saaxiibka codka ma xaqiijin karin fadhigan. Mar kale gal ama hadda isticmaal saaxiibka offline-ka.
errors.timeout: Saaxiibka codka ayaa aad u dheereeyay inuu ka jawaabo. Hubi xiriirkaaga oo mar kale isku day.
errors.network: Ma gaari karin codka saaxiibka. Hubi xiriirkaaga, kadibna isku day mar kale ama sii wad offline.
errors.genericVoice: Waxbaa carqaladeeyay wicitaanka codka. Mar kale isku day, ama sii wad saaxiibka offline-ka.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving u baahan yahay marin makarafoon si ammaan ah iyo wicitaannada saaxiibka AI.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving isticmaalaa goobtaada khariidadda badbaadada iyo astaamaha badbaadada ee agagaarka.
ios.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: VeryLoving isticmaalaa goobtaada si ay u taageerto socodka badbaadada iyo socodka degdegga ah.
ios.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving isticmaashaa goobta asalka ah si ay u gaarto badbaado iyo astaamaha aagga khatarta ah.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving isticmaalaa kamaradda kaliya markaad doorato inaad sawir profile ama badbaado qaadato.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: VeryLoving isticmaalaa maktabaddaada sawirrada oo kaliya markaad doorato profile ama sawir badbaado ah.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving isticmaalaa Bluetooth si ay ugu xirmaan dahabkaaga badbaadada NorthStar.
ios.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: VeryLoving isticmaalaa Bluetooth si ay ugu xirmaan dahabkaaga badbaadada NorthStar.
